CLM_DAY_CNT 
LABEL: 
Day Count (Length of Stay) 
DESCRIPTION: This is a derived field that calculates the beneficiary's length of stay in an inpatient or SNF setting. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_DAY_CNT 
LONG NAME: CLM_DAY_CNT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
4 
SOURCE: 
CMS Integrated Data Repository (IDR) 
FILE(S): 
IP base 
SNF base 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
The count of days is the (CLM_THRU_DT –
